home_description: Your intelligent farming companion powered by AI. Get personalized advice for crops, weather, market prices, pest diagnosis, and government schemes - all in your preferred language.
home_crop_advisor_desc: Get expert advice on crop selection, sowing, fertilizers, and harvest timing
home_weather_desc: 7-day weather forecast with AI-powered farming recommendations
home_mandi_desc: Real-time market prices and AI advice on when and where to sell
home_pest_desc: Upload crop images for AI-powered disease and pest identification
home_schemes_desc: Discover relevant government schemes and subsidies for farmers
crop_advisor_description: Get personalized crop advice based on your location, crop type, and sowing date
weather_description: Get 7-day weather forecast and AI-powered farming advice for your crops
mandi_description: Check current market prices and get AI advice on selling strategies
pest_description: Upload images of affected crops for AI-powered disease and pest identification
pest_upload_help: Upload a clear photo of the affected plant part (leaf, stem, fruit, etc.)
pest_no_image: Please upload an image for diagnosis
schemes_description: Find relevant government schemes and subsidies based on your profile
error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
error_api_key: Please provide an API key for cloud AI
error_ollama: Cannot connect to Ollama. Ensure it's running on localhost:11434

chatbot_description: Ask anything about farming, crops, weather, market prices, pests, and government schemes. I'm here to help!
